allow: PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $conn | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force; "Killed PID $\($_.OwningProcess\)" } } else { "nada en 4000" })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5174 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force }; "vite 5174 detenido" } else { "5174 libre" })
